title: Implement strStr() using KMP
coreIdea: Find the first occurrence of a pattern in a text in O(n+m) by precomputing a 'longest proper prefix which is also a suffix' (LPS) array for the pattern, allowing the search to skip re-examining characters after a mismatch instead of restarting from scratch.
recognitionCues: explicitly asks for better than O(n*m) brute force
pattern may have repeating structure that naive search re-checks
approach: Build LPS array for the pattern: for each position, the length of the longest proper prefix that's also a suffix of the pattern up to that position. During search, maintain pointers into text and pattern; on mismatch, use the LPS array to shift the pattern pointer instead of restarting text pointer, avoiding redundant comparisons.
